---
id: create-space
title: "创建空间"
description: "在指定父空间下创建子空间；parentSpaceId 为空时创建顶级空间"
sidebar_label: "创建空间"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/aiot-api/aiot-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"创建空间"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/spaces"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



在指定父空间下创建子空间；parentSpaceId 为空时创建顶级空间

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"通过授权获取的访问 Token。"},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 App ID。"},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 Key ID。"},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"随机字符串，每次请求都不同。"},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"请求时间戳，单位毫秒。"},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"Request signature. For information on how to generate the signature, please refer to [Sign Generation Rules](https://opendoc.aqara.com/en/docs/developmanual/apiIntroduction/signGenerationRules.html)."},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"语言，默认英文。支持 'zh', 'en' 两种语言。"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["name"],"properties":{"parentSpaceId":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"父空间ID；为空时创建顶级空间"},"name":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"description":"空间名称，不能为空字符串"},"settings":{"type":"object","description":"空间配置属性（创建/修改时均可选传入）","properties":{"gmtTimeZone":{"type":"string","description":"标准GMT格式时区，如 GMT+08:00","example":"GMT+08:00"},"locationId":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"家庭位置标识，支持经纬度串（如 \"123.456,78.90\"）或城市编码（如 \"30372\"）"},"autoAdjustDst":{"type":"boolean","default":true,"description":"是否自动调整夏令时（Daylight Saving Time）"}},"title":"SpaceSettings"}},"example":{"parentSpaceId":"space-home-001","name":"客厅","settings":{"gmtTimeZone":"GMT+08:00","locationId":"123.456,78.90","autoAdjustDst":true}},"title":"CreateSpaceRequest"},"example":{"parentSpaceId":"space-home-001","name":"客厅","settings":{"gmtTimeZone":"GMT+08:00","locationId":"123.456,78.90","autoAdjustDst":true}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"请求发起成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"Message type"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"API version","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"Message ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"Business status code, 0 indicates success"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Message"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"string","description":"新创建的空间ID"}}}],"example":{"type":"CreateSpaceResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-000000000006","code":0,"message":"success","data":"space-livingroom-001"},"title":"CreateSpaceResponse"}}}},"400":{"description":"Request Parameter Error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"Parameter xxx cannot be empty"},"description":"Error response. >
